title: pelargonium angustifolium
intro: Pelargonium angustifolium, also known as Red Form or Narrow-leaved Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, such as geraniol and linalool, that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium angustifolium include relief from digestive problems, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pelargonium angustifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
